title: FE transaction approval requests: required information
body: "This guidance applies to colleges. It does not apply to academy trusts.  Colleges include:   further education corporations (FE colleges) sixth-form college corporations designated institutions, established or designated under section 28 of the Further and Higher Education Act 1992   The transactions that are beyond a college’s delegated authority are explained in part 5 of the college financial handbook.   Follow this process to submit an FE transaction approval request form.   "

taxons.title: Further education financial management and data collection
